steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Subtract 2 from both sides:
$$8x = 10 - 2$$
$$8x = 8$$

Divide both sides by 8:
$$x = 1$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: We found exactly one value of $x$ that satisfies the equation. A linear equation in one variable yields exactly one solution when the coefficient of the variable is non-zero. That matches choice A — A is correct.
